info.title: AzureLetsEncrypt 1.4.0 - Twitter:@DenisVoituron
info.description:
Generate a new free Let's Encrypt certificate for specifis domains.
You must install it manually in Azure (go to your "App Service / TLS/SSL settings" section.
The generated certificate will be store in a "./store" folder.

options.name: --domains
options.description:
List of domains to include in the certificate (no wildcard),
separated by comas.

options.name: --password
options.description: Password used to encrypt the pfx certificate.

options.name: --path
options.description: Root folder of the website (default is D:/home/site/wwwroot).
